title: Korak 7

challengeFiles.name: main
challengeFiles.contents:
def binary_search(search_list, value):
    path_to_target = []
    low = 0
    high = len(search_list) - 1
    
    while low <= high:
        mid = (low + high) // 2
        value_at_middle = search_list[mid]
challengeFiles.seed:
def binary_search(search_list, value):
    path_to_target = []
    low = 0
    high = len(search_list) - 1
    
    while low <= high:
        mid = (low + high) // 2
        value_at_middle = search_list[mid]

tests.text: Trebalo bi da koristiš putanju append() za dodavanje value_at_middle u listu path_to_target.

description: Sada, uključite value_at_middle u spisak path_to_target za praćenje preduzetih koraka tokom pretraživanja, bez obzira da li je to cilj.
